decisions.title: Scale production infrastructure now or wait for Q2 capacity planning
decisions.context: Multiple scaling signals: prod RDS scale (ENG-8424), gov RDS replica scale (ENG-9131), data-batcher OOMs (ENG-9133). Infrastructure hitting capacity limits across environments.

arguments.for: Customer signal quality degrading. Scaling unblocks Nail the Core (reliability). Prevents outages that hurt Decisions Captured metric.
arguments.against: Q2 budget cycle starts April 1. Emergency scaling bypasses cost optimization review. Could wait 3 weeks for planned capacity.

decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 saved explorations vs Canvas integration
decisions.context: Explore V2 saved exploration features (ENG-8031-8035) in flight. Competes with Canvas roadmap items. Both critical to Embed Deeper pillar.

arguments.for: Saved explorations = reusable Signal>Evidence patterns. Increases Decisions Captured by enabling workflow persistence. Quick win.
arguments.against: Canvas is differentiated moat builder. Explore V2 features are table stakes. Should focus on competitive advantage.

decisions.title: Address Parquet enum import bug before K2 Mission pipeline launch
decisions.context: Parquet enum bug (ENG-9150) impacts data quality. K2 Mission pipeline (ENG-9104) starting. Bug could corrupt aerospace customer data.
decisions.blockedBy: Need reproduction case from K2 customer. Waiting on customer engagement.

arguments.for: Aerospace vertical = Build the Moat opportunity. Data corruption kills trust. Fix before launch prevents costly rollback.
arguments.against: Bug exists in current system. No customer reports yet. K2 pipeline could validate fix in production. Don't delay strategic launch.

decisions.title: Invest in Python Rules observability vs new Sift Edge features
decisions.context: Python runner orphaned job reaper needed (ENG-9146). Broken alerting needs upgrade (ENG-9160). Sift Edge simulator variations in progress (ENG-9157).

arguments.for: Python Rules = core evidence engine. Reliability gates Nail the Core. Observability prevents silent failures that degrade decision quality.
arguments.against: Sift Edge simulation = customer demos. Drives pipeline. New capabilities > operational work. Edge is moat differentiator.

decisions.title: Ship Explore V2 zoom/pan fixes or bundle with downsampling upgrades
decisions.context: Chart zoom bug (ENG-8866), Y-axis pan (ENG-9159), saved panel configs (ENG-8946) are UX bugs. Downsampling improvements (ENG-8790, ENG-9040-9041) are performance features.

arguments.for: Bundle = better story. Downsampling + fixed interactions = 'Fast & Smooth' release. Marketing angle for Embed Deeper.
arguments.against: Bugs block workflows now. Ship fixes immediately. Downsampling is complex, could delay 2+ weeks. Don't hold user value hostage.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy coordination week: infrastructure decisions + explore v2 alignment + k2 mission kickoff consuming 80% of scheduled time
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today - insufficient for deep decision work
3 one-on-ones clustered Wed/Thu - spread across week for better context
Friday has 7 hours of meetings - protect Friday afternoons for strategy thinking
